index.heroSubtitle: Building elegant solutions with .NET and Flutter

about.title: About
about.backgroundText: A dedicated software engineer with a passion for building robust, scalable applications. Specializing in enterprise solutions with .NET and cross-platform mobile development with Flutter. Focused on Clean Code principles, test-driven development, and delivering high-quality software that makes a real impact.
about.qualityFirstDesc: Writing clean, maintainable code that stands the test of time.
about.continuousLearningDesc: Staying current with emerging technologies and best practices.
about.userFocusDesc: Building solutions that solve real problems for real users.
